commit_scope: The architect's OTHER layer type now trains on Metal, closing the type axis on the GPU. jit-tensor-emit.fk gains jte-attn-train-msl, a Form recipe that emits the cross-attention-residual training step h = x + Wo*attend(Wq*LN(x), ks, vs, scale) -- tbp-layer-step on an 'attn' layer, updating Wq and Wo -- as one Metal kernel. It composes every attention-core gradient (softmax-back, the dv partition, the dq weighted-key sum) plus the pre-LN and the residual highway, with the recipe's exact folds. scripts/metal_attn_audit.sh trains a d=4 attention layer on the M4 Max and parity-gates the GPU weights against an fp32 CPU mirror. With the FFN-core (jte-mlp-train-msl) and residual-block (jte-resid-train-msl) kernels, both architect layer kinds now train on the silicon, so arch-search's full (depth x width x TYPE) grid can be timed on the GPU.

local_validation.summary: attn-train-emit-band -> 7 three-way (Go=Rust=TS), 0 divergent: the attention training-step emitter is byte-identical across kernels (4282-byte canonical MSL), name-parameterized, deterministic. The FFN-core, residual-block, and affine emitter bands all stay green (the shared fexp/ftanh helpers are unchanged). LIVE GPU WITNESS scripts/metal_attn_audit.sh on this M4 Max: emits the attention kernel, compiles it, and trains a d=4 / 3-key attention layer (updating Wq and Wo) -- loss 2.72 -> 1.8e-12 in 200 steps at 0.24 ms/step -- and parity-gates the GPU weights against an fp32 CPU mirror of the same step (LN, q=Wq.n downward, scores+softmax over the recipe's own fexp, att forward sum, residual, Wo^T.gy, softmax-back, dq weighted-key sum, the two SGD updates): max|dW| = 3.0e-7, within fp32 epsilon. 3-KERNEL ONLY (Go=Rust=TS): gated alongside the fp64 transformer op family; the Metal/Swift witness is Darwin+swiftc only (soft-skips elsewhere).

known_limitations.limitation: The attention kernel runs the whole step in ONE thread (the architect's attn blocks are small -- few keys, small projection dims -- so the per-key and per-projection-row work is tiny). This is correct and matches the recipe's folds serially, but does not yet exploit the GPU's parallelism across keys and projection rows.
known_limitations.follow_up: A multi-thread variant: thread-per-key for scores/softmax/value-mixing, thread-per-row for the Wq/Wo matvecs and updates, with barriered phases like the FFN kernel.

known_limitations.limitation: Parity is within fp32 epsilon (max|dW| 3.0e-7), not bit-exact, because the softmax uses the recipe's own fexp (a Taylor-and-square-up exp); a 1-ULP divide difference between Metal and Swift is amplified by the squaring. The matvec folds (fastMathEnabled=false) match exactly; the residual epsilon is the transcendental, same as the FFN kernels.
known_limitations.follow_up: None needed; within-epsilon is the honest claim for a softmax kernel. The loss descending to 1.8e-12 is the learning witness; the 3e-7 weight agreement is the correctness witness.

known_limitations.limitation: 3-kernel only: gated alongside the fp64 transformer op family; the Metal/Swift live witness is Darwin+swiftc only.
known_limitations.follow_up: The fourth arm gains this family when the transformer bands are flattened for fkwu.

ci_validation.summary: attn-train-emit-band rides the default validate.sh suite via its '; preludes:' header (jit-tensor-emit.fk); CI three-way gate applies. The Metal witness is host-only and not part of CI.

deploy_validation.summary: Stdlib emitter recipe + band + a host GPU audit script; no route or service change. Rides normal merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The architect's attention-residual layer -- the 'attn' kind arch-search picks on retrieval tasks -- now trains on the M4 Max GPU via a Form-emitted Metal kernel, parity-gated against the recipe's fp32 CPU semantics. With the FFN-core and residual-block kernels, both layer kinds the architect ranges over train on the silicon.
test_flows: validate.sh attn-train-emit-band (three kernels agree, verdict 7): the attention training-step MSL emitter is deterministic and byte-identical three-way
metal_attn_audit.sh: the emitted attention kernel compiles, trains Wq/Wo on the GPU (loss 2.7 -> 1.8e-12), and matches the fp32 CPU mirror within epsilon
e2e_validation.summary: Proven three-way (emitter) and live on the M4 Max GPU (the attention layer trains on the silicon, parity within fp32 epsilon).

phase_gate.gate: the architect's attention-residual layer trains on Metal: jte-attn-train-msl emits the Wq/Wo training step through softmax-back, the dv partition, the pre-LN and residual (byte-stable three-way), and the live M4 Max witness trains a d=4 attention layer with the GPU weights within fp32 epsilon of the recipe's CPU semantics. Both architect layer kinds now train on the silicon
phase_gate.next: arch-search dispatching the GPU trainers per candidate over a mixed FFN/attention grid; a multi-thread attention kernel parallelizing across keys and projection rows
